top.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
top.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

top.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
top.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

top.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
top.summary: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.

top.title: Canvas hack: Company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
top.summary: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.

top.title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
top.summary: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.

top.title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
top.summary: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

title.#text: There’s an internet choke point in the Middle East — is the solution in the North Pole?
Amazon’s ultrafast 30-minute deliveries are now available in more cities
